natural_language_question: What was the total Global Equity (sum of customer equity across TP + IBAN + Options + custodied assets) as of 2026-06-08?
sql_used:
SELECT SUM(pop.Equity) AS TotalGlobalEquity
FROM main.etoro_kpi_prep.v_population_funded pop
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
  ON snap.RealCID = pop.RealCID
 AND snap.IsValidCustomer = 1
 AND pop.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE pop.DateID = 20260608

natural_language_question: What was the total amount in USD of external (non-internal-transfer) deposits to the Trading Platform on 2026-06-08? External deposits are payments made from outside the eToro ecosystem (e.g. card or wire from a customer's bank).
sql_used:
SELECT
    SUM(m.AmountUSD) AS TotalExternalDepositsUSD
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_mimo_allplatforms m
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = m.RealCID
   AND snap.IsValidCustomer = 1
   AND m.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE
    m.DateID = 20260608
    AND m.MIMOPlatform = 'TradingPlatform'
    AND m.MIMOAction = 'Deposit'
    AND m.IsInternalTransfer = 0
    AND m.IsIBANQuickTransfer = 0
sut_text_answer: databricks/databricks-claude-sonnet-4-6 grounded on 'domain-payments'; 3 describes, 3 rounds; row[0]=['15424567.430000']; scalar=15424567.43.

natural_language_question: How many distinct customers had a successful global cashout (any platform: TP, IBAN, Options, MoneyFarm) on 2026-06-08? GlobalCashedOut is a 0/1 per-customer flag on the daily-status table.
sql_used:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ds.RealCID) AS distinct_customers_global_cashedout
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_customer_daily_status ds
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
  ON snap.RealCID = ds.RealCID
 AND snap.IsValidCustomer = 1
 AND ds.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE ds.DateID = 20260608
  AND ds.GlobalCashedOut = 1

natural_language_question: What was the total Daily PnL (realized NetProfit + unrealized mark-to-market change) across all positions on 2026-06-08?
sql_used:
SELECT
    SUM(pnl.NetProfit + pnl.UnrealizedPnLChange) AS TotalDailyPnL
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_pnl pnl
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = pnl.RealCID
   AND snap.IsValidCustomer = 1
   AND pnl.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE pnl.DateID = 20260608

natural_language_question: What was the total mark-to-market unrealized PnL across all open positions as of 2026-06-08? Negative means open positions are aggregately under water.
sql_used:
SELECT SUM(pnl.UnrealizedPnLChange) AS TotalUnrealizedPnL
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_pnl pnl
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = pnl.RealCID
   AND snap.IsValidCustomer = 1
   AND 20260608 BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE pnl.DateID <= 20260608
